zh.lifeSummary: 當Ephraim Gould於1505年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Thomas Gould33歲，母親Katherine Preston25歲。他於1524年與Margaret Moore在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ephraim Gould于1505年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Thomas Gould33岁，母亲Katherine Preston25岁。他于1524年与Margaret Moore在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gould
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gold
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Meyer, Mayer, Hyman, Ari, Avram, Mendel, Moshe, Shraga, Aviva.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Gold, Yiddish gold ‘gold’. In North America it is often a shortened form of one of the many compound artificial names of which Gold is the first element.

English and German: from Middle English go(u)ld, or Old English and Old High German gold ‘gold’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for someone who worked in gold, i.e. a refiner, jeweler, or gilder, or as a nickname for someone who either had many gold possessions or bright yellow hair.

variants.name: Guild
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Ephraim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, pronounced ‘ee-frame’ borne by one of the sons of Joseph and hence one of the tribes of Israel. The name probably means ‘fruitful’ in Hebrew; it is so explained in the Bible (Genesis 41:52 ‘and the name of the second called he Ephraim: For God hath caused me to be fruitful in the land of my affliction’). This was used by the Puritans in the 16th century, but was used more widely in the 18th and 19th centuries. It is still a common Jewish given name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ephraim Gould was born in 1505, in Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas Gould, was 33 and his mother, Katherine Preston, was 25. He married Margaret Moore in 1524, in South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1585, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 80.

ko.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Ephraim Gould(이)가 1505년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Gould(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Preston(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 피터에서 Margaret Moore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ephraim Gould родился в 1505 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Gould было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Preston, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Moore в 1524 г. в местности соут элмхам ст питир, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1585 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.
